effective 10/01/2018
708 GG0110D_PRIOR_WLKR_IND GG0110D_PRIOR_WLKR_IND GG0110D Prior Walker Indicator CHAR 1 Indicates the resident's use of a walker prior to the current illness, exacerbation, or injury. effective 10/01/2018
709 GG0110E_PRIOR_ORTHTCS_IND GG0110E_PRIOR_ORTHTCS_IND GG0110E Prior Orthotics Indicator CHAR 1 Indicates the resident's use of orthotics/prosthetics prior to the current illness, exacerbation, or injury. effective 10/01/2018
710 GG0110Z_PRIOR_NONE_OF_THE_ABV
